metadata.description: Managed-autonomy workflow for Claude Code: 11-step loop with audit/critique skills, four-lens parallel staff-review, diff-focused security + a11y reviews, agent-isolated planner + docs helpers, project-config-driven ship + ship-spike pipelines, plus consumer-side template directory (web / swift / tauri-rust-ts stacks) and bootstrap + migration docs.

plugins.name: flow
plugins.description: Managed-autonomy 11-step loop. Bundles the skeptical reviewers (auditor + plan-critic), the four-lens parallel staff-review (engineer / UX-designer / design-engineer / push-further), diff-focused /flow:security-review + /flow:accessibility-review, /flow:ship + /flow:ship-spike pipelines, /flow:workflow-help, planner + docs context-isolation agents, portable rules (general, plan-discipline, documentation, exploration), memory-corpus tool, flow.config.json JSON Schema (14 slots), and default hooks. v1.2.0 adds the consumer-side template directory (web / swift / tauri-rust-ts stack overlays + base scaffolds) and bootstrap + migration docs, plus security regression fixtures for the cwd-constraint + malicious-config defenses.
